problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Acoustic. Acoustic levitation for contactless manipulation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
